message:
fix(types): return error on encode_batch size overflow instead of resize(usize::MAX)

encode_batch's pass-1 size accumulator used unchecked `+=` on
header_content_size and body_size, and recovered from a checked_add
failure on total_size by falling through to `.unwrap_or(usize::MAX)`.
On overflow, the subsequent `out.resize(total_size, 0)` would try to
allocate usize::MAX bytes and panic/OOM rather than surfacing a
useful error.

Replace all three accumulators with checked_add + explicit
FrankenError::Internal so encode_batch of pathologically large
inputs returns a clean error to the caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
